vulnerabilities.remediation: Enforce strong password policy. Change default credentials.

vulnerabilities.title: SSRF via Profile Image URL
vulnerabilities.remediation: Validate and restrict URLs. Block internal/private IP ranges.

vulnerabilities.title: XSS - Stored in Feedback
vulnerabilities.evidence: HTML payload accepted and stored in feedback
vulnerabilities.remediation: Sanitize feedback content. Use DOMPurify or similar on frontend.

vulnerabilities.title: Negative Quantity in Basket (Price Manipulation)
vulnerabilities.evidence: Negative quantity accepted in basket item
vulnerabilities.remediation: Validate quantity is positive integer server-side.
vulnerabilities.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

vulnerabilities.title: Password Change via GET (no CSRF token)
vulnerabilities.evidence: Password change accepted via GET parameters
vulnerabilities.remediation: Use POST with CSRF token. Require current password verification.

vulnerabilities.title: Directory Traversal - Null byte bypass for FTP
vulnerabilities.evidence:
File accessible (20755 bytes): <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" conten
vulnerabilities.remediation: Validate file paths server-side. Use allowlists for served files.

vulnerabilities.title: FTP Directory Listing (0+ files)
vulnerabilities.evidence: Directory listing with sensitive files exposed
vulnerabilities.remediation: Disable directory listings. Restrict access to FTP-served content.

vulnerabilities.title: Sensitive File Exposure - Confidential business document
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove sensitive files from web root. Restrict FTP access.

vulnerabilities.title: Sensitive File Exposure - Legal document
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove sensitive files from web root. Restrict FTP access.

vulnerabilities.title: Sensitive File Exposure - Package backup with dependencies
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove sensitive files from web root. Restrict FTP access.

vulnerabilities.title: Sensitive File Exposure - Historical coupon codes
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove sensitive files from web root. Restrict FTP access.

vulnerabilities.title: Sensitive File Exposure - Application error logs
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove sensitive files from web root. Restrict FTP access.

vulnerabilities.title: XSS - Potential DOM-based
vulnerabilities.evidence: SPA renders fragment parameters without apparent sanitization
vulnerabilities.remediation: Use DOMPurify to sanitize fragment-based routing parameters.

vulnerabilities.title: XSS - Potential DOM-based
vulnerabilities.evidence: SPA renders fragment parameters without apparent sanitization
vulnerabilities.remediation: Use DOMPurify to sanitize fragment-based routing parameters.

vulnerabilities.title: Error Disclosure - Invalid user ID
vulnerabilities.evidence: Verbose error message / stack trace exposed
vulnerabilities.remediation: Use generic error pages. Never expose stack traces in production.

vulnerabilities.title: Missing Security Headers (4)
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add all recommended security headers: CSP, HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options.

vulnerabilities.title: Zero-Star Feedback (Rating Manipulation)
vulnerabilities.remediation: Validate rating is between 1-5 server-side, not just client-side.

vulnerabilities.title: Valid Coupon Code: WMNSDY2019
vulnerabilities.remediation: Implement proper coupon expiry. Use cryptographic coupon generation.

vulnerabilities.title: Valid Coupon Code: ORANGE2020
vulnerabilities.remediation: Implement proper coupon expiry. Use cryptographic coupon generation.

vulnerabilities.title: Valid Coupon Code: WMNSDY2021
vulnerabilities.remediation: Implement proper coupon expiry. Use cryptographic coupon generation.

vulnerabilities.title: Valid Coupon Code: INTERNATIONALDAY
vulnerabilities.remediation: Implement proper coupon expiry. Use cryptographic coupon generation.
